name: Stop Shot
description: Stun the cue ball so it stops dead after contact. Center-low hit, medium speed.

name: Follow Shot
description: Cue ball follows through after contact. Hit above center — cue ball should reach the far rail.

name: Draw Shot
description: Pull the cue ball back after contact. Hit low with a smooth follow-through.

name: Two-Ball Position: Follow
description: Pot the 1-ball into the corner and use follow to get position on the 2-ball.

name: Three-Ball Run
description: Run three balls in order. Plan your cue ball position two shots ahead.

name: L-Shaped Position Play
description: Navigate the cue ball in an L-shape. Draw on shot 1, follow on shot 2.
